emails.subject: Nanny
emails.body: Hi Carol, I saw that you posted about getting a nanny. I've used two services, but only one that I can suggest. For my last nanny, I used Morningside Nanny Service, or something close to that. They seemed thorough, and found us a wonderful person. I've also used River Oaks Nanny, but they sent me a nut case. Good luck, Kay
